forClubs.heroTitle: The Smartest Way to Capture, Stream & Grow Your Club
forClubs.heroDesc1: At Staydia Sports, we're on a mission to give every sports club—big or small—the tools to grow, connect, and succeed through cutting-edge AI-powered technology.
forClubs.heroDesc2: We install professional-grade, fixed-position AI cameras at no cost to your club, allowing you to automatically capture every home game without needing a cameraman, editing software, or technical know-how.
forClubs.freeCameraDesc: We sponsor your club with a high-end AI camera system that captures every match on your main pitch or court—fully automated, 24/7 ready.
forClubs.livestreamDesc: Games are streamed to your fans via our Staydia platform or can be integrated with existing broadcast tools like Joymo or Basketball Ireland systems.
forClubs.smartHighlightsDesc: Use our dashboard to instantly create highlight reels, training clips, or social media content with ease.
forClubs.automatedSetupDesc: Once installed, our system requires zero effort from club volunteers. It runs automatically for every home game or training session.
forClubs.fanSubscriptionsDesc: Allow supporters to watch from anywhere
forClubs.noTechHassleDesc: We handle install, support, and automation.
forClubs.noMissedMomentsDesc: Every match, automatically captured from the perfect vantage point.
forClubs.noLimitsDesc: Use for livestreaming, analysis, community building, and monetisation.
forClubs.builtForAllDesc: Whether you're a junior grassroots team or a senior club in a national league, Staydia Sports helps you shine on and off the field.
forClubs.readyToTransformDesc: Schedule a consultation to learn how Staydia can help capture every match at your club automatically.
forClubs.partnershipFaqDesc: We understand you might have questions about how our partnership works. Here are answers to the most common questions we receive from clubs considering Staydia Sports.
forClubs.faq1q: What's the catch? How can this be free for our club?
forClubs.faq1a: Staydia Sports invests in your club by providing the AI camera and platform. We generate revenue through affordable subscriptions for fans who want to watch your games live and on-demand. Your club benefits from professional broadcasting at no cost and earns from any in-game advertising you secure on your streams.
forClubs.faq2q: Is the long term partnership a concern? What if our needs change?
forClubs.faq2a: Our partnership agreement signifies our commitment to a long-term partnership and continuous improvement of the platform. It allows us to make the upfront investment in technology for your club. We aim to grow with you and are always open to discussing evolving needs.
forClubs.faq3q: How difficult is the installation and maintenance?
forClubs.faq3a: Installation is straightforward, and our team provides full support. The AI camera system is designed for minimal maintenance, and we offer ongoing technical assistance to ensure everything runs smoothly. It's truly a 'set and forget' solution for most operations.
forClubs.faq4q: What are our obligations as a partner club?
forClubs.faq4a: Your main role is to champion the service to your fans and community, and to work with us to schedule broadcasts. We handle the technology and streaming. The more you promote, the more potential for fan subscriptions and your own advertising revenue.
forClubs.faq5q: What kind of advertising can we do?
forClubs.faq5a: You have full control over the advertising displayed during your club's live streams. This can include local business sponsorships, club announcements, or any other promotions you secure. We provide the platform; you reap the advertising rewards.
forClubs.faq6q: What about data privacy and footage ownership?
forClubs.faq6a: Staydia is fully GDPR compliant for EU/UK regulations. Your club retains ownership rights to all match footage, while we maintain a license to use footage for platform improvements and promotional purposes. We take data privacy seriously and ensure all user information is securely stored and properly managed.

forLeagues.title: For Leagues
forLeagues.subtitle: Elevate Your Entire League With AI-Powered Broadcasting
forLeagues.description: Staydia Sports partners with leagues and federations across Ireland and the UK to deliver professional-quality coverage at scale - without the complexity or cost of traditional production.
forLeagues.whyItem1: No upfront cost for cameras or equipment
forLeagues.whyItem2: Fan engagement that builds stronger league culture
forLeagues.whyItem3: Added value for sponsors and local businesses
forLeagues.whyItem4: A modern tool to support development and retention
forLeagues.whyItem6: Increased visibility for the entire league
forLeagues.centralisedDesc: We provide AI-automated cameras to every club in your league — ensuring consistent coverage of every match, across every level.
forLeagues.sponsorshipDesc: Generate new commercial income through dynamic sponsor placements across every livestream. Your league, your sponsors, your revenue.
forLeagues.scalableDesc: No more patchwork livestreams. Staydia delivers a standardised viewing experience for fans, scouts, and media — every game, every week.
forLeagues.visibilityDesc: Make your league more visible and valuable. Attract players, retain talent, and showcase your community with every streamed fixture.
forLeagues.supportDesc: From installation to monitoring and scheduling games — we handle everything. Your clubs don't need tech skills or media teams to go live.
forLeagues.integrationDesc: If your league has an existing media or streaming partner, Staydia can still enhance access. We can capture and feed content directly — without disrupting commercial contracts.
forLeagues.step1Desc: We work with your organization to understand needs and develop a tailored implementation plan.
forLeagues.step2: Cameras are installed at no cost to clubs
forLeagues.step2Desc: Our team handles all technical aspects of installation across all participating venues.
forLeagues.step3: You gain a fully livestreamed league within weeks
forLeagues.step3Desc: Your entire league benefits from professional quality livestreams, all managed automatically.
forLeagues.step4: Revenue is shared through platform sponsorship and fan subscriptions
forLeagues.step4Desc: Generate new revenue streams through your enhanced digital presence and reach.
forLeagues.ctaTitle: Ready to Broadcast Every Match in Your League?
forLeagues.ctaSubtitle: Let's chat — and bring your league or federation into the future of sports media.

revenueSharing.heroSubtitle: Turning Matches into Money — For Your Club
revenueSharing.heroDesc1: At Staydia Sports, we don't just provide cameras — we help your club unlock a brand new, sustainable revenue stream through our automated AI-powered livestreaming platform.
revenueSharing.heroDesc2: Our revenue-sharing model is simple, transparent, and built with one goal in mind: to financially support clubs at every level.
revenueSharing.noUpfront: No upfront costs. No hidden fees.
revenueSharing.noUpfrontDesc: We cover all equipment and installation costs. You only share revenue when your club starts earning.
revenueSharing.step1: We Install the Camera — For Free
revenueSharing.step1Desc: You pay nothing for your smart AI-powered camera and setup. We cover the hardware and install it at your ground.
revenueSharing.step2Desc: Every home game played on your main pitch or court is automatically captured and streamed to your club's fanbase via Staydia's platform.
revenueSharing.step3Desc: Supporters subscribe monthly to watch your matches live and on-demand. Each fan subscription directly supports your club.
revenueSharing.step4Desc: We split the subscription income with your club — every month. As your viewership grows, so does your revenue.
revenueSharing.sponsorPlacementsDesc: Insert your club's local sponsors directly into the livestream — static or rotating ads. Sponsors love the exposure. You keep the revenue.
revenueSharing.premiumContentDesc: Clubs have the option to offer exclusive highlight reels, behind-the-scenes content, or coaching footage for added income streams.
revenueSharing.monthlyRevenueDesc: Earn recurring revenue from fan subscriptions to watch your matches, building a stable income stream for your club.
revenueSharing.clubsDesc: Earn monthly income with no upfront investment. Build a stronger connection with your fanbase.
revenueSharing.leaguesDesc: Build a sustainable media presence and unlock new sponsorship value across all member clubs.
revenueSharing.sponsorsDesc: Reach loyal local audiences in a brand-safe, high-impact environment with measurable engagement.
revenueSharing.whyItem1: No capital cost or upfront investment from clubs
revenueSharing.whyItem2: Aligned incentives: the more your fans watch, the more your club earns
revenueSharing.whyItem3: Simple, automated payouts — no extra admin
revenueSharing.whyItem4: Allows clubs to reinvest in development, equipment, coaching, and facilities
revenueSharing.ctaTitle: 📞 Ready to Earn from Every Game?
revenueSharing.ctaDesc: Your club is already putting in the work on the pitch. Let's help you get rewarded off it.

about.storyDesc1: At Staydia Sports, our passion drives everything we do. We believe every club, no matter its size, deserves professional-quality broadcasting capabilities to showcase their talent and connect with their community.
about.storyDesc2: Founded with a mission to democratise sports broadcasting, we've built a platform that transforms how clubs share their games, engage with fans, and grow their presence.
about.missionDesc: To empower sports clubs with accessible, professional-quality broadcasting technology that helps them grow and engage their community.
about.communityDesc: We're proud to serve a growing network of clubs across Ireland, Wales, and England, helping them share their sporting moments with fans worldwide.
about.impactDesc: Through our AI-powered platform, we're helping clubs increase their visibility, generate revenue, and build stronger connections with their supporters.
about.joinFuture: Join the Future of Sports Broadcasting
about.joinFutureDesc: Whether you're a small local club or a regional league, our technology is designed to help you reach new heights. Let's grow together.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about Staydia Sports.
faq.q1: How does Staydia's camera technology work?
faq.a1: Our AI-powered cameras use advanced computer vision to automatically track the ball and action during matches. The system operates autonomously without the need for a camera operator, capturing high-quality footage of every game.
faq.q2: Is there any cost for clubs to install the system?
faq.a2: No, there is zero upfront investment required from clubs. We install and maintain all the necessary equipment at our own cost. Clubs can focus on what they do best while we handle the technology.
faq.q3: How do clubs make money with Staydia?
faq.a3: Clubs can generate revenue through fan subscriptions to watch matches and through in-stream sponsorship opportunities. All advertising revenue secured by the club goes directly to the club.
faq.q4: What sports does Staydia currently support?
faq.a4: We currently support football (soccer), rugby, hockey, and basketball, with plans to expand to additional sports in the future.
faq.q5: How can fans watch the matches?
faq.a5: Fans can watch live streams and replays through the Staydia platform, accessible via web browsers on any device. We also offer mobile apps for iOS and Android for an optimized viewing experience.
faq.a6: Typical installation takes 1-2 days. Our team works around your club's schedule to ensure minimal disruption.
faq.q7: Can coaches and players access match footage?
faq.a7: Yes, authorized club personnel receive premium access to all match footage for training and analysis purposes at no additional cost.

fanEngagement.title: Fan Engagement
fanEngagement.subtitle: Turn Every Game into a Club-Wide Event
fanEngagement.description: At Staydia Sports, we believe fan engagement isn't just about viewership — it's about connection. Our AI-powered streaming platform helps clubs of all sizes build deeper relationships with their supporters, attract new fans, and grow stronger communities around their sport.
fanEngagement.liveStreamingDesc: We broadcast every home game in high-definition — automatically. This means fans never miss a moment, whether they're watching live or catching up later. From parents abroad to local supporters at home, everyone gets front-row access.
fanEngagement.socialMediaDesc: We provide clubs with highlight clips, big moments, and custom visuals that can be posted straight to social media. It's never been easier to keep your online community active, engaged, and growing — without needing a media team.
fanEngagement.dataInsightsDesc: Our platform tracks viewer activity, showing which matches drive the most attention and where your supporters are tuning in from. Use this to better target your communications, sponsorships, and club promotions.
fanEngagement.communityTiesDesc: By livestreaming all games — from youth fixtures to senior matches — you bring your entire club into the spotlight. Families stay connected, alumni stay invested, and new fans feel welcome from the first stream.
fanEngagement.boostRevenueDesc: More engaged fans means more subscriptions, more sponsor visibility, and more opportunities to support the club. Staydia turns every view into value.
fanEngagement.whyChoose: Why Clubs Choose Staydia for Fan Engagement:
fanEngagement.benefit6: Celebrate every team, not just the first XI
fanEngagement.letFansBeThere: Let Your Fans Be There, Even When They Can't Be
fanEngagement.letFansDesc: Whether it's raining sideways or a packed weekend, your fans can still be part of the action — every game, every team, every goal.
